case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. VS. ROBERT YON et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD: DENIED. SERVICE WAS BY MAIL PURSUANT TO CCP 1290.4 (B))1), SERVICE SHOULD HAVE BEEN BY HAND. JUDGE: DIANE E. WICK; REPORTER: CANDANCE YOUNT, CSR #2737
